name: migration_v2_to_v3
notes: v2 saves carry bare-string session_beats; v3 wraps them as { id, ts: null, text, sceneId: null } and adds scenes/chapters. Beat ids are generated, so expectations assert only stable fields. Runner also asserts idempotency.

session_beats: Kael arrived at the harbor at dusk.
A stranger offered Kael a sealed letter.

session_beats.text: Kael arrived at the harbor at dusk.
A stranger offered Kael a sealed letter.
